testsuite.name: com.ryan.fatura_service.service.PdfServiceTest

testcase.name: Deve gerar Fatura em PDF com sucesso quando transação for CREDITO
Deve gerar Extrato em PDF com sucesso quando transação for DEBITO
Deve lançar GeracaoPdfException quando o ITextRenderer falhar
Deve lançar TransacaoNaoEncontradaException quando não houver transações

testsuite.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/home/ryan-dias/.gradle/caches/modules-2/files-2.1/net.bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/f09415827a71be7ed621c7bd02550678f28bc81c/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
